subject: FW: Lesley, re conversation with Jeffrey
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Methusula [mailto:Methusula@pz.harvard.edu] 
Sent: Friday, October 12, 2007 9:08 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: littlestjeff@yahool.com; Christian Hassold; Casey Metcalf; hgasst
Subject: Lesley, re conversation with Jeffrey


Hi, Lesley. Sorry to have missed your call to my home yesterday.   
 
Today (Friday) is not a good time for me, but I'll be home the whole
weekend, if Jeffrey is free.  Next week is pretty hectic, but I will be
in NYC with some free time on Oct 23 and on the morning of Oct 30, if
Jeffrey is around on either of these days.

Please advise what makes the most sense-- for now, communication by e
mail is the most efficient.

Thanks and best to you both, Howard Gardner

Lesley Groff

Subject: Lesley, re conversation with Jeffrey

Hi, Lesley. Sorry to have missed your call to my home yesterday.   
 
Today (Friday) is not a good time for me, but I'll be home the whole weekend, if Jeffrey is free.  Next week is pretty hectic, but I will be in NYC with some free time on Oct 23 and on the morning of Oct 30, if Jeffrey is around on either of these days.

Please advise what makes the most sense-- for now, communication by e mail is the most efficient.

Thanks and best to you both, Howard Gardner
